legacy.content:
--- status: complete phase: 02-planning-docs-cleanup-and-narrative-state-space-simulations updated: 2026-02-24T03:47:44.715Z ---
## Tests
### 1. PRD and key decisions live in .planning; general docs/ are not extended. Simulation notebooks in `notebooks/` visualize the 3D narrative state space, saliency, dialog triggering, and Verlet+constraints so we can understand and communicate how the system will behave—no game code. expected: PRD and key decisions live in .planning; general docs/ are not extended. Simulation notebooks in `notebooks/` visualize the 3D narrative state space, saliency, dialog triggering, and Verlet+constraints so we can understand and communicate how the system will behave—no game code. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 2. Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 01 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 3. PRD and key decisions live in .planning; general docs/ are not extended. Simulation notebooks in `notebooks/` visualize the 3D narrative state space, saliency, dialog triggering, and Verlet+constraints so we can understand and communicate how the system will behave—no game code. expected: PRD and key decisions live in .planning; general docs/ are not extended. Simulation notebooks in `notebooks/` visualize the 3D narrative state space, saliency, dialog triggering, and Verlet+constraints so we can understand and communicate how the system will behave—no game code. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.
### 4. Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. expected: Plan 02 outputs are reflected in code or docs artifacts. result: skipped notes: Skipped in non-interactive mode.

- total: 4 - pass: 0 - issue: 0 - skipped: 4
